current_context.message: Preseason plumbing dry-run is available; live betting card has not published yet.

model_readiness.reason: Replay and active-policy walk-forward both clear baseline stability checks.

observations: Do not make this a hard gate yet; every expectation row in the current replay uses a thin result sample.
Best simple overlay in this sample is value_gap_no_conflict: 12-2 over 14 plays.

candidate_policy.recommendation: Track expectation alignment as an annotation and candidate spread threshold bump. Do not hard-gate production picks until more full-season feature rows are available.

top_policy_simulations.description: Keep totals; remove spread picks when value-gap side conflicts with the pick.
Keep totals; remove spread picks when Pythagorean side conflicts with the pick.
Keep totals; remove spread picks when either value-gap or Pythagorean side conflicts.
Keep totals; require spread picks to align with value-gap side.
Keep totals; require spread picks to align with Pythagorean side.

promoted_factors.recommendation: Simulate as a soft overlay before changing production recommendations.
Simulate as a soft overlay before changing production recommendations.
Keep visible in Research and re-evaluate after each graded week.

promotion_overlay_simulations.description: Keep only picks matching this promoted factor.
promotion_overlay_simulations.recommendation: Too restrictive for production; useful as a confidence tag.

promotion_overlay_simulations.recommendation: Too restrictive for production; useful as a confidence tag.

promotion_overlay_simulations.description: Keep totals; require side picks to align with this factor.
promotion_overlay_simulations.recommendation: Candidate threshold-bump policy; keep monitoring play starvation.

promotion_overlay_simulations.description: Keep totals; remove spread picks when this alignment factor conflicts.
promotion_overlay_simulations.recommendation: Best candidate for a soft veto simulation, not production gating.

recommendations: Keep degraded source status visible; current sample is too small for a hard veto.
Do not promote factor overlays to production when critical sources are unsafe or missing.
For live 2026 runs, require action markets, queries, and referee trends before final recommendations.

verdict.recommendation: Sample is still thin; keep WARPS as an explanation and conflict tag.

policy_simulations.description: Keep totals; remove spread picks when WARPS conflicts with the selector side.
Keep totals; require spread picks to agree with WARPS.
Keep totals; require spread picks to have at least 1 WARPS point and no conflict.
Keep totals; require spread picks to agree with WARPS by at least 2 points.

verdict.recommendation: total is the current best selected market, but sample is still monitor-only.
Track CLV, but do not promote price gates until the selected-bet sample is larger.

warnings: using generic dated RotoWire file for week 11
using generic dated RotoWire file for week 12
missing week-specific RotoWire file for week 18

verdict.recommendation: Current weekly workflows are close to operational for 2026, but full-season historical selector validation remains blocked until earlier weekly query/referee files are restored or regenerated.
blockers: Weeks 1-9 are missing weekly query/referee input files.

next_steps: Restore or regenerate week1-week9 query/referee files before rerunning full 2025 selector replay.
Run one 2026 preseason dry run after current 2026 data sources are available.
Keep WARPS, market router, and CLV gates in monitor mode until the graded selected-bet sample grows.

survivor_backtest.method: Uses historical no-vig moneyline probabilities as pregame win probabilities; grades against actual straight-up winners.

survivor_pool_ev.method: Simulates public survivor entries using estimated pick popularity from no-vig moneyline probability, spread size, home field, division status, and brand chalk.
